index 3eb3494..4c721f2 100644
--- a/CEO_NOTES.md
+++ b/CEO_NOTES.md
@@ -281,2 +281,21 @@
   - Increased S3 dev for the acquisition test; total dev is $6,300/day.
 - Watch next week: A $119 conversion, S2 saturation, S3 ad test performance, tier 6 capacity headroom, support age, and cash rebuild after tier 6 R&D plus market discovery.
+
+## Week 18 / Day 119
+
+- Cash: $2,118,980. Subscribers: 118,189. Week 17 added 20,789 subscribers from 50,806 leads, but cancellations jumped to 2,043 and cash fell by $553,612 after tier 6 R&D and heavier spend.
+- A $119 weakened S2 paid conversion: S2 content produced 39,195 A leads and 18,778 subscribers, about 47.9%, down from ~56.5% at A $109.
+- S3 paid test failed at current quality/price: content generated 4,274 lost and 14 subscribed; search generated 1,403 lost and 4 subscribed. Stopped S3 paid acquisition.
+- Week 17 cash flow excluding prior R&D/start costs: subscription payments $3,151,936; ops -$812,000; compute -$762,541; ads -$665,000; capacity -$196,000; dev -$44,100; lead acquisition -$25,907.
+- Issues: S2 has 11,493 open, avg age 0.37 days, max 62. Support is keeping most issues fresh but volume is large.
+- Changes:
+  - Reverted A to $109; B/C set to $279/$499.
+  - Upgraded all plans to model tier 4. This doubles A compute but raises broad quality and makes D_S07/D_S04 viable without waiting for dev accumulation.
+  - Held capacity at tier 6.
+  - Researched D_S07 and D_S04 to info level 2, expected day 122.
+  - Added targeted acquisition tests: D_S07 content $10k/day + search $5k/day; D_S04 content $7k/day + search $3k/day. Kept S2 content at $80k/day.
+  - Lead promos: D_S07 $20, D_S04 $20, S3 $30, D_S10 $40, S2 $0.
+  - Targeted dev now includes D_S07 $5k/day and D_S04 $5k/day; total dev $14.3k/day.
+  - Ops set to $130.5k/day total: global $25k, S2 $100k, D_S07 $2k, D_S04 $2k, S3 $1k, S1 $0.5k.
+  - Did not start another R&D tier this week; A tier 4 raises immediate compute risk and cash should be preserved until the new segment tests read out.
+- Watch next week: A tier 4 compute, whether A $109 restores S2 conversion, D_S07/D_S04 acquisition economics, churn after the $119 week, and tier 6 headroom.
